goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 08:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 0'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stevenage
The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 08:30
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 0
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
